questions.question: Who among the following was the ruler of Kanchi during the time of Samudragupta ?
questions.explanation: King Vishnugopa (Pallava dynasty ) of Kanchi is mentioned in the list of rulers of the South defeated by Samudra Gupta. It is mentioned in the Allahabad Pillar inscription of Samudra Gupta.

questions.question: Parnadatta was appointed the Provincial Governor of Saurashtra by __?
questions.explanation: Skandgupta’s Junagarh Inscription: It states that Skandagupta appointed Parnadatta as goptri (governor) of Surashtra (Saurashtra).

questions.question: Who was the founder of Gupta Dynasty?
questions.explanation: Sri Gupta was the founder of Gupta Dynasty and adopted the title ‘Maharaj’.

questions.question: Which Gupta emperor was an expert Veena player?
questions.explanation: Samudragupta was an expert ‘ Veena’ player and adopted the title of Kaviraj (King of poets). He was not only a great warrior but also a great patron of art and literature.

questions.question: Who was the court poet of Samudragupta?
questions.explanation: Harisena, a highly esteemed poet, served as a court poet of Samudragupta, a notable ruler of the Gupta Empire in India. He is renowned for his Prayag Prashasti inscription that glorified the numerous achievements of Samudragupta. This inscription is an eloquent tribute to Samudragupta’s military prowess,benevolence, and cultural patronage. Harisena’s eloquence and literary brilliance made him an integral part of Samudragupta’s court.
